EARTH'S MIGHTIEST EATER

field documentation · do not distribute

Threat Level · 18
Personal File · Aizeck June 2026
Happy Birthday Aizeck,

You're officially not a minor anymore so your first gift should be getting arrested. But before that, I'd like to let you know of my gratefulness for your presence in my life and hope that I can give the same grace to yours.

At the start of meeting you I always was reluctant to your bond of friendship as I was at a point where I was having people in my life who aren't genuine and outgoing. I didn't trust how genuine you are and couldn't believe there's still someone like you who has that kind of mind.

Being buds with you made me appreciate the friends that I have and that being alone is the most awful thing to experience. Your presence made me realize that good people may just randomly pop into your life and it's your job to keep them around.

I hope our friendship will last longer than you taking a shit bro (that's like forever) and I pray you find someone who treats you as sweet as the food you munch.

Thank you for being friends with me and Happy Birthday Best Bud.
